test_scenarios.prompt: A red sedan is driving 30 mph when the blue SUV ahead suddenly brakes hard
A white truck signals and changes lanes to the right on a highway
A pedestrian starts crossing at a marked crosswalk as you approach
The vehicle in front maintains constant speed of 25 mph in a school zone
A motorcycle merges into your lane from an on-ramp
An elderly person with a walker slowly crosses the street
The car ahead accelerates from a stop sign
At a four-way stop, two vehicles arrive at the same time from perpendicular directions
Heavy rain reduces visibility while following a vehicle with no tail lights on
Three cars ahead of you suddenly slow down due to traffic congestion
A yellow traffic light turns red as you approach at 35 mph
Dense fog limits visibility to 20 meters on a winding road
Two vehicles simultaneously attempt to merge into your lane from both sides
A jogger runs along the road edge then suddenly turns to cross
An ambulance with sirens approaches from behind while you're in heavy traffic
A construction zone with a flagman directing alternating traffic through one lane
A group of school children starts crossing while their crossing guard stops traffic
At a complex roundabout, multiple vehicles enter and exit while a cyclist navigates the outer lane
A deer jumps onto the road from the forest at dusk
A police car with lights flashing pulls over another vehicle ahead of you
A shopping cart rolls into the street from a parking lot
Black ice causes the vehicle ahead to skid sideways while it's snowing heavily
A drone flies low across the road causing the driver ahead to swerve
During rush hour, a bus stops to let passengers off while a cyclist passes on the right and a pedestrian crosses between cars
A mattress falls off a truck ahead on the highway at 65 mph
